blur_detection.description: The text and edges are significantly blurred, making it difficult to read.
blur_detection.recommendation: Re-scan the document with a higher resolution and ensure the camera is stable.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, paymentMethod, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The presence of these fields, along with the detailed breakdown of the fare and taxes, confirms it as an expense document related to a flight.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields for expense identification are present, and the document details a completed flight transaction with payment confirmation.

issues.description: The receipt should use the local employer name instead of the individual employee's name as per the compliance requirements.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Worker name on travel documents - 'Where it is not possible to use the Local Experts name e.g. on flight tickets/hotels, the workers name and details should be used' and End client name prohibition - 'The end client shouldn't be mentioned'.

issues.description: The receipt indicates various taxes, which will be subject to gross-up as per the compliance policy.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Gross-up rule for all approved expenses - 'All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax free'.

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the business trip as per the compliance policy.
issues.recommendation: Submit a separate report for each business trip.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Additional information requirement for business trips - 'Business Trip - submit a separate report for each trip'.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with the customer name, tax implications requiring gross-up, and missing additional documentation for the business trip. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified ICP and country requirements.
